name: lookup_expense
description: Look up an expense report by ID or by the most recent submissions for a user. Returns amount, status, approver, and submission/payment dates.

username.description: Look up most recent expenses for this user (used if expense_id not provided)

name: get_reimbursement_status
description: Get the status of a user's pending reimbursements — total amount owed, expected payment date, and any blocking issues.

name: corporate_card_info
description: Get the status of a user's corporate card — active, suspended, lost, current month spend, and limit.

name: lookup_expense_policy
description: Look up the company expense policy for a given category (meals, travel, software, conferences). Returns reimbursable limits and required documentation.
